content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://www.nationalgeographic.com/health/article/intermittent-fasting-health-benefits", "source_title": "What intermittent fasting really does for your body and brain", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Fasting is a common practice, whether for religious reasons or with the goal of losing weight, preventing chronic disease, or even slowing a...", "direct_quote": "Fasting is a common practice, whether for religious reasons or with the goal of losing weight, preventing chronic disease, or even slowing aging.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "A small 2025 study found that overweight participants who practiced two months of intermittent fasting were more likely to maintain the patt...", "direct_quote": "A small 2025 study found that overweight participants who practiced two months of intermittent fasting were more likely to maintain the pattern years later. \u201cThis is important because most people who go on a calorie-restricted diet are often unable t", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "But there are caveats. \u201cMeaningful weight loss only occurs if intermittent fasting is properly implemented without overcompensating \u2018feast\u2019 ...", "direct_quote": "But there are caveats. \u201cMeaningful weight loss only occurs if intermittent fasting is properly implemented without overcompensating \u2018feast\u2019 hours or days,\u201d says Fontana.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
